creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #2)

Hi Robert,

This:
> RUSTFLAGS_i386= -C target-feature=+sse,+sse2
> RUSTFLAGS+= ${RUSTFLAGS_${ARCH}}

didn't work for me when I tried it a while back. Such RUSTFLAGS were't passed to the build.
Maybe it works now, I am not sure.


Yuri
